name: Code Slash
description: A swift energy-blade slash. The reliable basic attack.

name: Byte Impact
description: A heavy concentrated strike that hits a single target hard.

name: Glitch Step
description: Blinks a short distance and raises evasion for one turn.

name: Overwrite
description: Overwrites the target's data, dealing damage and lowering its defense.

name: Core Break
description: An armor-piercing finisher that ignores part of the target's defense.

name: Code Bolt
description: A ranged bolt of condensed code energy.

name: Arcane Circle
description: Detonates an arcane circle, damaging all enemies in a small area.

name: Code Shield
description: Wraps an ally in a barrier that absorbs incoming damage.

name: Data Paralysis
description: Corrupts a target's data, paralyzing it so it loses its next turn.

name: Rewrite
description: Rewrites an ally's damaged data, restoring a large amount of HP.

name: Code Collapse
description: Collapses the local code structure, dealing massive damage to all enemies.

name: Mech Smash
description: A crushing hammer smash. Zell's basic attack.

name: Gear Shock
description: Slams the ground, shocking all enemies adjacent to Zell.

name: Repair Field
description: Deploys a repair field that heals nearby allies.

name: Magnet Pull
description: Drags a distant enemy closer and deals minor damage.

name: Overdrive
description: Overclocks Zell, sharply raising attack and defense for several turns.

name: Core Burst
description: Vents the hammer's core in an explosive burst, hitting all nearby enemies.

name: Servo Slam
description: A heavy mechanical slam against an adjacent target.

name: Drone Shot
description: A ranged energy bolt fired from a hovering drone.

name: Corrupt Strike
description: A corrupting blow that wounds and weakens the target's defense.

name: Shock Bolt
description: A jolt that damages and paralyzes a target for a turn.

name: Group Volley
description: A spread of energy that splashes the whole party.

name: Mend Protocol
description: Repairs an allied unit, restoring its HP.

name: Enrage
description: Floods its core with rage, sharply raising its attack.

name: Laser Beam
description: A focused beam that lances a single target.

name: Ground Pound
description: A seismic slam that rocks everything nearby.

name: Drone Swarm
description: Releases drones that strafe an area.

name: Glitch Field
description: Corrupts an area, damaging foes and weakening their defense.

name: Eye Cannon
description: An overcharged core blast that devastates a single target.

name: Crushing Strike
description: A brutal melee blow.

name: Energy Blast
description: A ranged burst of corrupted energy.
